name: Alex Rivera
summary: Backend engineer with 5 years building distributed systems and payment infrastructure at scale. Led migration of monolith to microservices serving 50M+ daily requests. Passionate about Kubernetes, observability, and mentoring junior engineers.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Reduced payment API latency by 38% by migrating synchronous DB calls to async event-driven pipeline serving 12M transactions/day.
Led a team of 4 to re-architect fraud detection service, cutting false-positive rate from 3.2% to 0.9% and saving $2.1M annually.
Designed and shipped Kubernetes-based autoscaling for webhook delivery, achieving 99.97% uptime across 6 regions.
Mentored 3 junior engineers through onboarding, reducing time-to-first-PR from 3 weeks to 5 days.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built real-time DDoS mitigation pipeline in Go, processing 8Tbps peak traffic with sub-10ms classification latency.
Shipped CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions + Helm, cutting release cycle from 2 weeks to 2 days.
Increased test coverage from 41% to 87% across the edge routing service, eliminating 12 production incidents/quarter.

experience.title: Junior Backend Engineer
bullets: Delivered customer data pipeline ingesting 200GB/day to Redshift; reduced ingestion lag from 45 minutes to under 3 minutes.
Automated weekly manual reporting scripts, saving 6 engineering-hours per week.

projects.name: OpenTrace
projects.description: Open-source distributed tracing library with 1.2k GitHub stars; adopted by 3 Fortune 500 companies.
